//: Root package.json — declares this as an npm workspaces monorepo. The mobile app lives in apps/mobile. supabase/ is not an npm workspace; it's managed by the Supabase CLI. Add apps/admin later when the venue web portal is built (Phase 3).
name: activity-finder
description: Family activity discovery app for Northern Ireland and the Republic of Ireland.

scripts.//mobile: Convenience proxies into the mobile workspace.
scripts.//supabase: Supabase CLI passthroughs. The CLI is a devDependency, so `npm install` brings it in and these scripts resolve it from node_modules/.bin.

//overrides: react-native@0.81.5 ships react-native-renderer at 19.1.0, but Expo CLI's `expo install --fix` thinks SDK 54 wants react@19.2.5. The two have to match exactly or hooks blow up at render time. We pin react to 19.1.0 so the renderer and React agree.
